/usr/bin/ar qc lib/libengine.a CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/platform/platform.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/platform/internal/internal.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/platform/internal/memory.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/platform/types.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/platform/util.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/platform/sdl/audio/audio.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/platform/sdl/display/screen.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/platform/sdl/io/io.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/platform/sdl/memory/memory.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/platform/sdl/system/system.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/vendor/stb/stb.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/vendor/tomlc17/tomlc17.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/vendor/glad/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/engine/engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/engine/util.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/src/engine/gfx/gfx.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib lib/libengine.a
